task_completion.description: Read the mission specifications from the provided text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of ~/Desktop/lunascout_tli_spec.txt.

task_completion.description: Open GMAT and configure the spacecraft and mission sequence.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GMAT (General Mission Analysis Tool) GUI is open, showing the LunaScout-1 spacecraft properties or the mission tree being set up.

task_completion.description: Configure the Impulsive Burn (VNB) and Target sequence for the B-plane coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI showing an ImpulsiveBurn resource configured with V, N, B components, and a Target sequence set up to achieve BdotT and BdotR.

task_completion.description: Run the mission in GMAT and achieve targeter convergence.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT message window or output console showing that the targeting sequence ran and converged successfully.

task_completion.description: Save the configured GMAT script to the required output path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI showing the script saved as ~/GMAT_output/lunascout_tli.script, or a terminal window showing this file exists in the directory.

task_completion.description: Record the converged results in the required report file with exact formatting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing ~/GMAT_output/lunascout_tli_report.txt containing exactly four lines: 'Converged_Burn_V_kmps: <value>', 'Converged_Burn_N_kmps: <value>', 'Achieved_BdotT_km: <value>', and 'Achieved_BdotR_km: <value>'.

integrity.description: The agent used the GMAT application to design and run the trajectory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the GMAT GUI open and being actively interacted with, rather than the agent just writing a script blindly in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent actually ran the simulation to find the converged values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The GMAT output/message window should display convergence logs. The agent should not just guess or fabricate the burn values.

integrity.description: The values in the final report match the actual GMAT simulation results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The V, N, BdotT, and BdotR values entered into lunascout_tli_report.txt should correspond to the final output values visible in the GMAT GUI or script output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target B-plane coordinates are BdotT = 3500.0 km and BdotR = -2000.0 km. The initial burn V is 3.123 km/s. The GMAT script must be saved exactly to /home/ga/GMAT_output/lunascout_tli.script and the report to /home/ga/GMAT_output/lunascout_tli_report.txt. The report must contain exactly the four specified keys.
